contexte: clean bathroom vanity with marble and soft morning light
prompt: Candid lifestyle moment with Silk Pillowcase being used naturally in clean bathroom vanity with marble and soft morning light. Spontaneous and authentic feel. Format: vertical 9:16 (Instagram Story format). Primary color accent: #FFB6C1. Style: high-end e-commerce product photography, clean, bright, Pinterest-optimized. Lighting: soft natural light. Text overlay space: leave room at top and bottom for Pinterest UI. The image must stand out in a Pinterest feed of similar products. No watermarks, no logos, no text in image.
